recommendations.title: Spacehunter: Adventures in the Forbidden Zone
recommendations.overview: On a distant planet inhabited by mutants, two bounty hunters race to rescue three Earth female captives from the clutches of an evil warlord.

recommendations.title: Vampire Hunter D: Bloodlust
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Horror, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: D, a legendary dhampir competes with a motley family of bounty hunters to track down Charlotte Elbourne, a young woman who has seemingly been abducted by vampire nobleman Meier Link.

recommendations.title: For a Few Dollars More
recommendations.overview: Two bounty hunters both pursue the brutal and sadistic bandit, El Indio, who has a large bounty on his head.

recommendations.title: Kites
recommendations.overview: A wounded man searches for his sweetheart in the Mexican desert while on the run from the police, bounty hunters, and others.

recommendations.title: Cowboy Bebop: The Movie
recommendations.overview: The year is 2071. Following a terrorist bombing, a deadly virus is released on the populace of Mars and the government has issued the largest bounty in history, for the capture of whoever is behind it. The bounty hunter crew of the spaceship Bebop; S

recommendations.title: Babylon 5: The River of Souls
recommendations.overview: A group of Soul Hunters come to Babylon 5 demanding the return of something that was stolen from them.

recommendations.title: Critters 2
recommendations.overview: Three bounty hunters from space fly back to the town of Grovers Bend, hoping to save local residents from a new batch of Critter eggs.

recommendations.title: One for the Money
recommendations.overview: An unemployed lingerie buyer convinces her bail bondsman cousin to give her a shot as a bounty hunter. Her first assignment is to track down a former cop on the run for murder – the same man who broke her heart years before. With the help of some fri

recommendations.title: Mythica: The Darkspore
recommendations.overview: Fighting through creature-infested lands and pursued by bounty hunters, Marek and her company are in a race to recover all the shards of the Darkspore before it falls into the hands of an evil wizard.

recommendations.title: Battle Angel
